# Experiment Backlog

## First-frame tests

```text
1. face vs no face
2. before/after vs talking head
3. result-first vs setup-first
4. visible problem vs abstract claim
5. data screenshot vs visual example
```

Primary metrics:

```text
YouTube Shorts: chose-to-view
TikTok: 1–3s retention, full watch
Instagram: average watch time, non-follower reach
```

## Hook tests

```text
6. problem-first vs result-first
7. contrarian vs neutral
8. proof-first vs claim-first
9. curiosity gap vs direct answer
10. short hook vs long hook
```

Primary metrics:

```text
3-sec hold
first retention cliff
completion
comment sentiment
```

## Text tests

```text
11. captions only vs no captions
12. edited captions vs auto captions
13. short headline vs full-sentence overlay
14. labels vs full transcript
15. top-third text vs centre text
```

Primary metrics:

```text
average percentage viewed
completion
saves
readability comments
```

## Story tests

```text
16. before-after-why vs listicle
17. problem-test-result vs pure advice
18. myth-evidence-correction vs standard tutorial
19. first payoff at 3s vs 10s vs end
20. proof early vs proof late
```

Primary metrics:

```text
completion
rewatch
saves
follows
```

## CTA tests

```text
21. save CTA vs no CTA
22. send CTA vs save CTA
23. comment A/B vs open question
24. follow for series vs follow for more
25. CTA early vs CTA end
```

Primary metrics:

```text
saves per reach
sends per reach
comments per reach
follows per 1,000 views
```

## Platform tests

```text
26. TikTok search topic vs trend topic
27. Reels Trial vs normal Reel
28. Shorts search title vs curiosity title
29. same edit cross-posted vs platform-native edit
30. 24h winner vs 7d/30d winner
```

Primary metrics:

```text
24h views
72h retention
7d search traffic
30d long-tail views
follows/subscribers per 1,000 views
```
